data.title: Write RED test: assert SC coverage haiku gate sub-step exists in sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create a failing test file that asserts the SC coverage haiku gate sub-step will exist in sprint SKILL.md after story d751-731a is implemented.

This is a structural boundary test (Rule 5 — behavioral testing standard for instruction files). The test checks that sprint SKILL.md contains specific sentinel text for the haiku gate: the sub-step header, haiku dispatch reference, fail-open language, 0-SC handling, and ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME idempotency.

**Test file**: `tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh`

**Test approach (Given/When/Then)**:
- Given: sprint SKILL.md at `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md`
- When: structural boundary assertions run against SKILL.md content
- Then: test fails (RED) because the SC coverage haiku gate sub-step language does not yet exist

**Assertions to include**:
1. SKILL.md contains a sub-step labeled "SC Coverage Haiku Gate" (or equivalent sub-step heading after Step 2a)
2. SKILL.md references `sc-coverage-haiku.md` prompt file in the sub-step
3. SKILL.md contains fail-open language (parse failure → skip + warn, proceed to Phase 3)
4. SKILL.md contains 0-SC epic handling (trivially pass with warning)
5. SKILL.md contains ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME idempotency language for the gate

**Pattern reference**: Follow `tests/skills/test-sprint-epic-selection-display.sh` and `tests/skills/test-preplanning-ui-designer-dispatch.sh` for test structure.

## File Impact
- CREATE: `tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh`
- MODIFY: `.test-index` (add entry mapping sprint SKILL.md to this test file)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists at `tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh`
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) when run against current SKILL.md (before implementation)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` to this test file
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md.*test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate' .test-index
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker `[test_sc_coverage_haiku_gate]` for `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md`
  Verify: grep '\[test_sc_coverage_haiku_gate\]' .test-index
